scope: 建立公开世界背后的私密档案层
为家庭、亲密关系、未来传承和 vault 封存提供边界
确保公开构建只接触脱敏索引和封存信号
acceptance: 所有私密层 publicBuild 必须 excluded 或 included-redacted
脱敏索引不得保存 raw private content
vault/sealed 只暴露 signal 和 metadata
公开发布必须人工确认
publicBuildRule: private/family/partner/vault/sealed are excluded from public build unless an owner-approved redacted projection exists
